generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted on the motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DataTransmittedMotorPosition
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder behind the gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DataTransmittedGearboxPosition
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DataTransmittedCurrent
]

instance TorqueSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Torque sensor measuring output torque"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DataTransmittedTorque
]

instance AngularVelocitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Angular velocity sensor measuring rotational speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DataTransmittedAngularVelocity
]

instance AccelerationSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Acceleration sensor measuring angular acceleration"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DataTransmittedAcceleration
]

instance DataTransmittedMotorPosition : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance DataTransmittedGearboxPosition : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance DataTransmittedCurrent : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance DataTransmittedTorque : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TorqueSensor
]

instance DataTransmittedAngularVelocity : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AngularVelocitySensor
]

instance DataTransmittedAcceleration : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AccelerationSensor
]

instance MeasuredMotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor position data (r_M)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DataTransmittedMotorPosition
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance MeasuredGearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured gearbox position data (r_G)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DataTransmittedGearboxPosition
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance MeasuredIMData : DTDFVocab:Data [

    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance MeasuredTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured torque data (τ)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DataTransmittedTorque
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance MeasuredAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured angular velocity data (ω)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DataTransmittedAngularVelocity
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool

instance MeasuredAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured angular acceleration data (a)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DataTransmittedAcceleration
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool

    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingTool
]

instance SysMLIBDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingTool
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model in MATLAB Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model in MATLAB Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool

    base:desc "Dahl friction model in MATLAB Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool

instance SysMLModelingTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for system modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SimulinkSimulationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for data management"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance MQTTDataStreaming : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT for data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIKControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionAccuracyImprovementService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionIdentificationInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization in a unified dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy improvement through friction model refinement for robot control algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyAction
]

instance FrictionIdentificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction identification insights used to refine robot control algorithms for improved motion accuracy"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of robot performance metrics"
]

instance MotionAccuracyAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Refinement of robot control algorithms based on friction model"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor (input current I_M, output torque τ_M)"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearwheel (torque τ_G)"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox (torque τ_out)"
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIKController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller (controls axes via position, speed, or acceleration inputs)"
]

instance RobotFirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot with maximum working range [-90°, 90°] and maximum speed 75°/s"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox, SiemensSINUMERIKController, MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder, CurrentSensor, TorqueSensor, AngularVelocitySensor, AccelerationSensor
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming with live measurements during robot operation, enabling immediate synchronization between physical system state and digital shadow representations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A purpose-driven digital shadow structured around the Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM), with concrete incarnations of Purpose (FrictionDerivation), Asset (Mabi), DataTraces (e.g., I_M, r_M), Processing components (Simulation M, Simulation GW), and simulation models (SysML, Simulink) linked via MQTT data streams."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As-operated phase, capturing real-time operational data during robot use, including wear effects, tool changes, and application-specific variations in joint friction."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated data versus measured reference data to detect friction loss, with multi-physics-aware identification using white-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) friction models to ensure accuracy of friction dynamics."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time streaming of sensor data (current, position, torque) from physical robot to digital shadow, with data traces structured as time-series arrays of torque and angular velocity values."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for industrial asset modeling, SysML for system architecture description, and Industrie 4.0 standards for digital shadow implementation."
]
